summary: Sodium butyrate exacerbated neuroinflammation in an MPTP Parkinson mouse model, alongside worsening broader Parkinson-related pathology.

outcome: motor performance and dopaminergic neuron survival
summary: Sodium butyrate improves motor performance and reduces dopaminergic neuron loss in MPTP-induced Parkinson's disease mice.
Sodium butyrate reduced prefrontal-cortex neuroinflammation in DSS ulcerative-colitis mice while also improving intestinal barrier integrity.
Sodium butyrate reduced neuroinflammation in 5XFAD mice and improved synaptic plasticity.
Sodium butyrate supplementation prevents ethanol-induced increases in pro-inflammatory cytokine expression and normalizes microglial changes in the hippocampus of mice.
Sodium butyrate reduces neuroinflammation in chronic alcohol-exposed mice by suppressing microglial activation and lowering pro-inflammatory cytokines.
Sodium butyrate alleviated lead-induced neuroinflammation and improved cognition in a lead neurotoxicity context.
Pharmacologic butyrate treatment attenuates expression of IL-1β, TNF, and IL-6 in microglia from aged mice after LPS challenge.
Sodium butyrate reduced M1 microglia-associated neuroinflammation in cardiac arrest mice.
Clostridium butyricum treatment suppressed microglial activation in the brain of APP/PS1 Alzheimer's disease mice.

outcome: neurologic injury after traumatic brain injury
summary: Short-chain fatty acid supplementation after traumatic brain injury attenuates neurologic injury via the gut-brain-microglia axis.
Sodium butyrate reduced infarct volume in a diabetic-stroke mouse model.

intervention: diet engineered to increase microbial production of acetate and butyrate
outcome: long-term neurologic impairment after traumatic brain injury
summary: A diet engineered to increase microbial production of acetate and butyrate attenuates long-term neurologic impairment after traumatic brain injury.
Butyrate prevents gut-brain amyloid-β pathology and neuroinflammation in an Alzheimer mouse model.
